---
title: "06. 宗师、死生与化生一体"
subtitle: "Masters, Death-Life Transformation, and Unified Process"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 6
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "The strongest structure here is that local state changes do not destroy the larger process-object. Inverse-limit language captures this because no single phase is the whole, yet the whole is compatibl..."
---

**Chapters:** 6, 18, 22  
**Omega Directions:** `modular-tower-inverse-limit`, `dynamical-systems`, `spectral-theory`

{{< include articles/category_06_death_life_transformation_unified_process.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_06_death_life_transformation_unified_process Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_death_life_transformation_unified_process_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_death_life_transformation_unified_process_video.mp4 >}}

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_06_death_life_transformation_unified_process_infographic.png)

---

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
